flux.prompt: A cinematic 16:9 widescreen desktop wallpaper, painted digital art style, no text, no recognizable objects. Deep ink-bleed abstract composition: inky navy void at the center fading into luminous oxblood crimson and warm amber at the edges like magma through dark water. Subtle swirling vector-field currents suggest a hidden flow — soft painterly brushstrokes, fine grain noise, vignetted corners, gallery-quality atmospheric marbling. Think nocturnal aurora filtered through black ink, minimal and mysterious, luxury moody palette. Dramatic depth, no central subject, just atmosphere and gradient — room for particles to be drawn on top later.

aurora.prompt: A cinematic 16:9 widescreen desktop wallpaper, painted digital matte style, no text, no people. Vast arctic night sky from a remote high-altitude plateau. Deep indigo-to-black gradient sky with thousands of pinprick stars and faint diffraction spikes on the brightest few. Soft vertical aurora curtains in translucent teal-green, pale cyan, and magenta-violet wisping and undulating across the upper two-thirds, faint reflection on patches of snow. Bottom third: a low dark silhouette of a jagged snow-capped mountain ridge. Calm, expansive, awe-inducing, cinematic astro-landscape photography vibe painted in matte, clean atmospheric haze, no visible horizon light pollution.

origami.prompt: A soft 16:9 widescreen desktop wallpaper, luxury paper-goods brand aesthetic, no text, no obvious subjects. Warm cream, blush peach, and butter-yellow gradient with a faint diagonal sunlight wash from upper left. Subtle paper-grain texture throughout. Scattered faint crease lines as if an enormous sheet of fine washi paper is gently folded — crease shadows delicate and barely-there, suggesting geometric origami folds in the corners without forming a specific animal. A few out-of-focus translucent paper fragments drift in the background at very low opacity. Japanese minimalist stationery aesthetic, meditative and tactile, painterly soft-focus, beautiful negative space center.
